sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.4g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.4g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 15g. the sugar load matters more than you would want. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 15g. the sugar load matters more than you would want. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 0.8g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for a fruit, the best ones stay sweet without going off the rails.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 0.8g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for a fruit, the best ones stay sweet without going off the rails.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 40% DV, vitamin a at 12% DV stand out most. that helps, but vitamins still are not the main selling point.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 40% DV, vitamin a at 12% DV stand out most. that helps, but vitamins still are not the main selling point.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV, iron at 1% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 4% DV, magnesium at 3% DV, iron at 1% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. hydrating whole-fruit package because water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

displayItems.title: hydrating whole-fruit package
displayItems.explanation: Water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets.

displayItems.title: easy to use as a whole food
displayItems.explanation: Simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating.

displayItems.title: brings a clean fruit identity
displayItems.explanation: It still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.subtitleText: on the plus side. hydrating whole-fruit package because water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. protein contribution is tiny because that is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth. sugar can climb fast because a lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet. satiety is not especially strong because fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Mango stands out for hydrating whole-fruit package and easy to use as a whole food. but it also gets held back by protein contribution is tiny and sugar can climb fast. Best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
